body:
We need a strong organization to make sure Elizabeth's ideas get heard in a crowded primary. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fd6b/45c30650/88d1813a/669797d9/580273841/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
Hey, do you have a minute?

I just checked our latest fundraising numbers.

Things are definitely picking up, but we're still slightly behind where we need to be to hit the April goal we laid out for Elizabeth.

She's running this campaign the right way -- listening to people about the problems they face, proposing bold plans that would solve those problems, and organizing a grassroots movement to make those ideas happen.

But it's only possible if all of us take part.

**I really appreciate that you've signed up to join this team.

According to our records for this email address, you haven't made a donation yet.** Every single grassroots donor owns an equal piece of this campaign and gets equal access to Elizabeth -- because it takes a grassroots movement to make real change, and she doesn't sell her time to wealthy donors at private fundraisers.

**[If you can afford to make your first contribution right now, it would really help our campaign get back on track before the deadline. Even $3 would make a difference.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fd6b/45c30650/88d1813a/669797d8/580273841/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWFwcjE5ZW9tIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDQyNWVtMi1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-apr19eom?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190425em2-full")**

Our plan for this presidential campaign has three parts: Identifying problems, proposing solutions, and organizing a grassroots movement to make those solutions happen.

You name a problem, and Elizabeth's got a plan to fix it.

But building a grassroots campaign to make sure she will win over the country with those plans takes real resources.

We need a strong organization -- with staff on the ground across the country -- to make sure Elizabeth's ideas get heard and break through in a crowded primary.

**[And you're the glue that holds the three pieces of the plan together. Your donation helps make sure that Elizabeth and her big plans are front and center in this race. Can you chip in for the first time right now?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fd6b/45c30650/88d1813a/669797d8/580273841/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWFwcjE5ZW9tIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDQyNWVtMi1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-apr19eom?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190425em2-full")**

**[https://my.elizabethwarren.com/make-your-first-donation](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fd6b/45c30650/88d1813a/669797da/580273841/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiMjAxOTA0MjVlbTItZnVsbCJ9/ "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/make-your-first-donation?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190425em2-full")**

Thanks for everything, and I hope I'll see you on the road. -roger

Roger Lau

name: Faiz Shakir, BernieSanders.com
subject: [BUMP] Joe Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
before midnight...
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1174%2E150750%2ETe0FC0)

**It's a big day in the Democratic primary and we're hoping to end it strong. Not with a fundraiser in the home of a corporate lobbyist, but with an overwhelming number of individual donations in response to today's news. Contribute before midnight. It would mean A LOT to our campaign.**
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10584?refcode=em190425-3-15&t=2&akid=1174%2E150750%2ETe0FC0)

* * *
Friends -
This campaign was never going to be easy.
From the start, we knew it would take an unprecedented grassroots effort in order to win this nomination.
Not only are we taking on a political and corporate establishment that will do and spend whatever it takes to stop us, but we are running against a record number of candidates at the same time.
And today, there is one more candidate in the race.
That makes today a big day for our campaign — and an important moment to show that we are the ones who can beat Trump and transform this country. So we are asking – especially today:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to our campaign today? We’ll put it right to work on the fight to win this nomination, while sending a message that ours is the campaign that will beat Trump and transform our country.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10584?refcode=em190425-3-15&t=27&akid=1174%2E150750%2ETe0FC0)
There are a lot of candidates in this race right now. But there is only one Bernie Sanders. You know that. Let’s have a big day for our campaign today. This is important. So thank you for contributing to our fight.
All my best,
Faiz Shakir
Campaign Manager
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10584?refcode=em190425-3-15&t=28&akid=1174%2E150750%2ETe0FC0)

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=29&akid=1174%2E150750%2ETe0FC0). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=30&akid=1174%2E150750%2ETe0FC0). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=31&refcode2=1174_150750_Te0FC0&akid=1174%2E150750%2ETe0FC0).

name: Brad Komar, Team Hickenlooper
subject: We have a lot of competition
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
There are now 20 candidates in the Democratic primary. What's next? | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771699/691c9bd/6cb7460d/11a4adcf/914821849/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-em-apr?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team, as you've probably heard, we have a lot of competition in this primary, including--as of today--a former vice president. You might even be asking this question right now: What next?

Our response is this: **We 're all in. We have an experienced candidate who knows how to bring people together and get big things done, and we couldn't ask for a better team than this one to help us propel John to the front of the pack in this contest.**

[**_Can you make your first donation today to help us reach our goal of adding 65,000 supporters to this team and spread John 's story across the country?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771699/691c9bd/6cb7460d/11a4adcc/914821849/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-em-apr?refcode=em_fr_20190425_BK_20190425-fr-BK-competitionbump-nop_nop_l1&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

We're aware of how large the field is. But John's the only one in this fight who has stood up to the NRA and won, who crafted methane standards that have become the model for fighting climate change, and who understands what it's like to face a shifting economy and respond by building a flourishing small business. His story and his record of accomplishment motivates us, and we know it will resonate with the American people.

What also makes us proud and fired up to fight for John is the support of this incredible team. Your passion and commitment thus far in this primary have blown us away--and we know that, with your support, more and more people will become aware of all that John has to offer.

[**_Today, as the field gets even more crowded, can you help us raise the resources we need and reach our goal of adding 65,000 supporters to share John 's story with voters across the country?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771699/691c9bd/6cb7460d/11a4adcd/914821849/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-em-apr?refcode=em_fr_20190425_BK_20190425-fr-BK-competitionbump-nop_nop_l2&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,
Brad

Brad Komar
Campaign Manager
Hickenlooper 2020 [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771699/691c9bd/6cb7460d/11a4adca/914821849/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-em-apr?refcode=em_fr_20190425_BK_20190425-fr-BK-competitionbump-nop_nop_contribbutton&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

subject: CNN is reporting that more Americans tuned in to watch Kamala’s town hall the other night than any other candidate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Why I’m asking
body:
This is a big moment for us. On Monday night, I announced my plan to take
action on common-sense gun reform within my first 100 days as president.
Already, both the NRA and Donald Trump, Jr. have attacked our campaign.
Make no mistake, our opponents -- both those running in the Democratic
primary and Trump’s team -- are watching our fundraising performance right
now to get a sense of how strong our campaign is.

I will be honest: at the
end of this email, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to power
our campaign for president. I want you to know why it’s so important, and
what difference your contribution will make.

The money we raise can’t capture the powerful conversations about the
future of our country I’ve had with people on the campaign trail. And
fundraising can’t measure the passion of our grassroots activists and
volunteers who are fired up and ready to get to work -- to do more -- to
win this campaign.

But our fundraising does have direct impacts on the choices our campaign
makes right now. It helps us make big investments in our organization that
will grow our movement. And it helps us respond to dishonest attacks.

Our campaign finance system is stacked against everyday people --
corporations and dark-money groups are able to spend as much as they want
to sway our democracy. Let’s be clear: this is wrong -- but it is what we
are up against.

But from day one, I made a commitment to you: our campaign will reject all
contributions from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists -- instead,
putting our campaign in the hands of the people.

We are already facing attacks from Donald Trump’s allies -- including the
NRA -- and it will only get tougher from here. There will be nasty attacks
and millions spent against us to stop our campaign. But I’ve been taking
on tough fights my entire life. I’m not afraid of them. Especially knowing
I have you in my corner.

So here is where I ask you: can you step up today with a contribution to
power our campaign for president?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190426-eom?refcode=ema190426-eom15-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1001&refcode2=4576_5755789_woXATu&akid=4576%2E5755789%2EwoXATu ]Chip in $5 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190426-eom?refcode=ema190426-eom15-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=250&express_lane=true&t=1005&refcode2=4576_5755789_woXATu&akid=4576%2E5755789%2EwoXATu ]Chip in $250 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190426-eom?refcode=ema190426-eom15-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1006&refcode2=4576_5755789_woXATu&akid=4576%2E5755789%2EwoXATu ]Another Amount

At the end of each month, I always look to see the growing number of
grassroots contributors who are pitching in what they can to our campaign,
whether it’s $5, $10, or $50. It makes me so proud to know we’re building
a movement of people pitching in what they can to make a difference.
I hope your name will be on that list,
too.

Thank you for all that you’ve done -- and will do -- to power our
movement.

For The People,

— Kamala Harris

name: Megan West
subject: VIDEO: Greg Laurie on the Jesus Revolution
body:
| | Peter, A few weeks ago, at the National Religious Broadcasters Convention, I had the opportunity to catch up with Pastor Greg Laurie and talk to him about his latest book, _The Jesus Revolution_. Pastor Laurie has been traveling the country for more than 30 years bringing the Harvest Crusade and the Gospel message to cities across America, and he has some meaningful insight for Christians in America today. He reminds us that America was born in a time of revival. _“Before we were established as a nation, people like George Whitfield and others were preaching the Gospel and thousands were coming to Christ, and it was with that transformation of people’s lives that the soil was made ready for the seeds of this great experiment that we call America.”_
–Pastor Greg Laurie Is America ripe for another revival today? [I ask Pastor Laurie this question and many more](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k3imAvkQjyVXVn8MxmF9JGU&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190426com01&n=1)! name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Give me a chance to explain what we do with your contribution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
Our job right now:
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1154%2E150750%2EXbXEZg)

Sisters and Brothers -
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to our campaign for president. But before I do, I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain what we’ll do with the donation, and why this request is so important.
Right now, our biggest advantage is the energy and enthusiasm of millions of people who are ready to fight to transform this country. No other campaign has that.
And our job right now is to build the organization and staff in states capable of channeling that enthusiasm into votes.
It’s something we’ve done in places like Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina and Nevada. It’s something we have to do more of in places like California and a number of Super Tuesday states, where a lot of delegates are won.
And if we can do that **_now,_** we’ll be the first campaign to do so. That means we’ll be the first campaign building relationships, and the first ones talking to voters.
That would give us a real advantage. One we didn’t have last campaign where we had to fight to catch up to the enthusiasm. But that is only possible right now with your support – so here’s where I ask:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to our campaign today? We will put your donation to work building out our organizations in every state so we can win the delegates needed to secure this nomination. Donating today would give us a big advantage. So this is important.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10584?refcode=em190426-1-subs&t=26&akid=1154%2E150750%2EXbXEZg)
Here is the truth: running for president is an extraordinarily expensive endeavor. It costs an obscene amount of money. Proving it can be done without begging millionaires and billionaires for money is something I am very proud of. You should be too.
But because the response to emails like this one is primarily how we fund this campaign, it means I have to ask. And this one is a very important request. So thank you for chipping in.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
[DONATE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10584?refcode=em190426-1-subs&t=27&akid=1154%2E150750%2EXbXEZg)

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=1154%2E150750%2EXbXEZg). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=29&akid=1154%2E150750%2EXbXEZg). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=30&refcode2=1154_150750_XbXEZg&akid=1154%2E150750%2EXbXEZg).
Submit this form to [update your contact information](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/update-info/?t=31&akid=1154%2E150750%2EXbXEZg).

Hi there -- Wanted to follow up on Jeanne Shaheen's email from yesterday.

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Nevada is Ground Zero for Automation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| | Friend --
[](http://my.yang2020.com/?e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=04262019_newsletter&n=1) Hello and thank you for the support—we really appreciate it! I landed in Las Vegas on Tuesday for our first campaign trip in Nevada. We met with local activists and hosted a town hall with 500 Nevadans: Our visit to Nevada was preceded by reality on the ground. It turns out that [Nevada is the #1 state](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=4d-EP2085KYNNWNPNqzMsxuUFnwQlKWrq8gFh6ZBoSQ5gfsOyDkR8n7T0Lo0E2jhEP-Zm8jpxqNjQL8V-7BZfUUyheVbLRbdhbTxXgXFinmDU6W1Pdm1ML1q20fLdNWT&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=04262019_newsletter&n=2 "Robots are
stealing Nevada jobs more than any other state") out of all fifty states in terms of the proportion of jobs that are subject to automation. [One study said](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=Ikda-N2htLNT_s1BOCsnzRpW8T5OjGGkEiBEGTEANC56ffklgKviASNBTNdspt8XDO2hDHTi5rFX3knReuvU1yg3Dck3ggS8kqg1t99A-Dg43RhvQlqrX5GJDSSAeNO-L4BRU-LrpQMb81GjHNdQ2XFjvvPqjmszcNBVE5NxVZqXXRHjV8vEwd4pTLWlvjrgfO4tJ-luiMDzNrWZKh1VJuGCFdW-oKLNU4XB-MJj6Dc&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=04262019_newsletter&n=3 "Future job automation to hit hardest in low wage metropolitan
areas like Las Vegas, Orlando and Riverside-San Bernardino") that 3 out of 5 of the jobs in retail, gaming, and hospitality are in danger. The Nevada economy revolves around those industries, followed closely by administrative/call-center work and transportation. This is happening right now. [MGM recently announced](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=qaAh0VSdOsF1dIQLoxJ6lT11-Aoo5yD6o4o1ZT4Q-ZyxhvInibPU5-1F0VIjfeHj3x29d7rIAdurHEo8eechW_iOhygCnMDIMXSvMy_r2xrB-oRsvcO-wZWrseyU528s&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=04262019_newsletter&n=4 "MGM Resorts to Replace Bartenders With Machines \(No, Really\)") that it will replace its bartenders with robots later this year and gave all of its current bartenders notice that they would be losing their jobs. I know this may sound like a joke or science fiction—but it is all too real to the families impacted. Bartending is how many Nevadans make ends meet. The children of various hospitality workers put together a [ _video_](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRbKqGIH5sZty1Hrf5dSqSrcutGJx39s-GHekGHDl6Z33Q&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=04262019_newsletter&n=5 "WHO'S NEXT? \(Children of workers subject to
automation\)") to call attention to what this means to them. MGM is a very smart company and has tested the robot bartenders in other locations. It turns out that customers don’t mind them. Some even like them. How long before other gaming companies follow their lead? When I met with local labor leaders, they were acutely aware of the danger. Protests have already broken out to try and shield their workers from technological changes. But union leaders know that change is in the air, and most of those changes will not be good for the workers they represent. There is a sense of searching for a solution. In part due to our campaign’s reckoning with the reality of automation, we had a very welcome audience throughout Las Vegas. Nevada is the 3rd state to vote and will set the tone in 2020. We made some friends in Reno and will be spending more time in the state. As part of the [Humanity First Tour](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=c5dAo5qulKAncvNYjq2uGcnHAN92nM1CHInwgA-PIi7HdTRyEez5JIs0AF2zI3zA&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=04262019_newsletter&n=6 "Humanity
First Tour Schedule"), I met with an artist who is packing UPS trucks to make ends meet and a counselor who is heading back to school to get a nursing degree. I learned a lot from each of them. I also met with a non-profit that is working on converting shipping containers to affordable housing; apparently, it costs about $35,000 to turn a shipping container into a comfortable-looking apartment for one complete with bedroom, bathroom, and kitchen. There is a lot of potential there. We are [polling at 3% in Nevada](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=fVc8ucaySv8SFEdMhk87O-J7Kfx-4kCDXGvdbkDZpGHQ86-oQ3ksB4uW4aUMuXoURRL9QRnTB-bcVwtl39Egj1QoHaP_LbUeSPWabiizW4ojdjC_Be88I6Yav5UhlrAkSWpJ9ui9gWibfSXfguKu5ePgxu-ExFxn6YrhJFHqyUDl3Byat2xa0YRKuqhsPd-Zfh8fgF4SL4uBWcBDITl4UA&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=04262019_newsletter&n=7 "Nevada
2020: Biden and Sanders lead Democratic primary field; Trump Looks to
Flip the Silver State Red")—and that percentage is set to grow. Several people came up to me and said that they were switching their party affiliation so they could caucus for me. Our message is very powerful and getting stronger all of the time. This weekend, I am in [Iowa](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=uuUyPGiVHWR_V3cUbcvCWWmOECFGhvzg9qgv352fDgfL-8v9exXDkBe47jS4Re_-PoVa7CjI-58bE-KieStvUYJQI9PqpKaGRIOjDOWfPgHjVk0zE_wggOm9YGMDVS92wBbrnlSV9SXtU5pEbJ7zHg&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=04262019_newsletter&n=8 "Andrew
Yang's Humanity First Tour in Des Moines"), and then next week we will be holding rallies in [Seattle](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=uuUyPGiVHWR_V3cUbcvCWdikqgOEmv95as43Y58cghcUJkVmfetEAp2sK9sThwBXl6kF9b220zNTt1ymCeJCsZOe56OrYKLWUp764mKCE5A&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=04262019_newsletter&n=9 "Andrew
Yang's Humanity First Rally in Seattle"), [Detroit](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=uuUyPGiVHWR_V3cUbcvCWdikqgOEmv95as43Y58cghePf9lMScPeEghyrDEJTI372Jo_PAP0tilgrUxF9-_kIhZdxRNpjs9OINDEUSjPWdOqhtCqG3Dl8BRJiUq-EIXY&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=04262019_newsletter&n=10 "Andrew Yang's Humanity First Rally in Detroit"), and [Minneapolis](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=uuUyPGiVHWR_V3cUbcvCWdikqgOEmv95as43Y58cghfQNMwNimpI6IcIFBC904TiQMcwbKUEVi49gZIY2_StcdgI8QQPhoX7uuq0QjXCUcw&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=04262019_newsletter&n=11 "Andrew Yang's Humanity First Rally in Minneapolis"). Then, we are back to [New York](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=uuUyPGiVHWR_V3cUbcvCWdikqgOEmv95as43Y58cghf92CPOI7pOoedoIqdOGAc6xUoSty6OWRxsrXn5Uz0RNzDr1f5Qjsj1hZQfbdRmW3g&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=04262019_newsletter&n=12 "Andrew Yang's Humanity First Rally in NYC") for what should be our biggest rally yet. The people in Nevada know what is going on around them—they are the new ground zero for the automation of jobs. $1,000 a month would be a game-changer for the families there and around the country. Let’s win in 2020 and get the Freedom Dividend to them as soon as possible. We don’t have that much time. -Andrew

**Can you make a donation today?**

Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us invest in people.

**Join the Yang Gang!**

If you'd like to volunteer to help with grassroots organizing, please fill out an organizer application [here](https://my.yang2020.com/yang_gang_app?e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=04262019_newsletter&n=16) and someone from our team will reach out.

|

body:
I am asking you to help my dear friend
---
| | In 2018 you helped us flip the House, but we have more work to do. If we want to truly make progress, we can't let Mitch McConnell and the GOP control the Senate. We have to flip the Senate in 2020. [_**That 's why I am asking you to help my dear friend Ben Ray Lujan win his critical Senate race and bring the Blue Wave to the Senate. Will you chip in $10 before his very first End of Month Deadline in 96 hours? >> **_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b585/18e32a7f/5d9781ab/7b80704a/291540478/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190426_em_fr_b1_schiff_all&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25") I watched Ben Ray lead the charge to reclaim the House for Democrats, and without him, we wouldn't be back in the Majority today. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: The right way to fight, and the only way to win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
This is our moment to dream big and fight hard for the big, structural change we need as a country. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fd61/45c30650/88b827fd/6697928b/298647024/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
I'm deeply grateful that you're a part of this campaign.

We're in this fight side by side. We make each other stronger. And we're a team.

**Now, here's where things stand for our team right now. We've got a huge fundraising deadline in a few days.**

And it's important -- powerfully important -- for me to ask you to chip in for the first time because I don't raise money from wealthy donors behind closed doors, and I don't get any funding from federal lobbyists or PACs.

Emails like this one bring in the money we need for things like hiring organizers, getting the word out about our new policy plans, and growing our grassroots movement.

**[So I'm asking: Can you please pitch in $3 or whatever you can afford?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fd61/45c30650/88b827fd/6697928a/298647024/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWFwcjE5ZW9tIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDQyNmVtMS1mdWxsLWEifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-apr19eom?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190426em1-full-a")**

That's how we'll keep up the fight. And here's something I've learned: It matters _how_ we fight -- confidence is at the heart of it.

We're not going to fight because we're afraid. We're not going to second-guess ourselves, or negotiate against ourselves, or settle for something we don't actually believe in -- because we're too scared to do anything else.

That's not who we are.

We're going to fight for what we believe in. When we do that, it doesn't drain our batteries -- it builds our muscles. We get stronger and stronger for the next fight, and the fight after that, and the fight after that.

**This is our moment to dream big and fight hard for the big, structural change we need as a country.** Universal Child Care. Canceling student loan debt for 42 million Americans. Universal free public college. The Ultra-Millionaire Tax. Breaking up big corporate monopolies. Ending corruption in Washington. Leveling the playing field for working people.

**[That's the right way to fight, and the only way to win, but I can't do it alone. Please make a contribution to our campaign before our big April fundraising deadline.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fd61/45c30650/88b827fd/6697928a/298647024/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWFwcjE5ZW9tIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDQyNmVtMS1mdWxsLWEifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-apr19eom?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190426em1-full-a")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

body:
It was another history-making week for Indiana. Our state leaders, including Governor Eric Holcomb and our Republican-led legislature, officially... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us11.campaign-archive.com/?e=1acd9bb3d6&u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=678cebc188)

| **_Historic budget, historic session_** It was another history-making week for Indiana. Our state leaders, including **Governor Eric Holcomb** and our Republican-led legislature, officially closed out the 2019 legislative session on Wednesday, advancing legislation that will positively impact the lives of all Hoosiers \-- students, teachers, parents, children, workers, employers, veterans and taxpayers.

And while Indiana's budget remains in the black, perhaps the biggest headline is the big boost we're seeing in K-12 education funding, with an astounding $763 million in new dollars allocated to Indiana schools, including a 2.5% funding increase each year of the budget in per-student funding. By paying off a teacher pension fund liability, Statehouse Republicans are sending an additional $70 million back to schools to raise teacher pay.

>From jobs to infrastructure, education to broadband connectivity -- and beyond -- thanks to Republican leadership at the Statehouse, Indiana's upward trajectory continues.

**PHOTO:** This weekend, we're excited to be welcoming 75,000 2nd Amendment-supporting Americans to our state for the NRA Convention! The convention is expected to have a $35 million economic impact on our state. Welcome, NRA members!
---
|
---
| | | **GOVERNOR HOLCOMB'S WEEK THAT WAS**
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4a0e090c09&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Governor Holcomb: “Indiana is On a Roll”_** With the end of session on Wednesday, there’s no question that 2019 was a banner year for **Governor Holcomb’s** Next Level Agenda. When he laid out his priorities for session, he promised “practical, people-centered solutions,” and he definitely delivered. Here’s just a few of the results he helped deliver for Hoosiers:
* Balanced Indiana’s budget for the eighth straight time and protected our AAA credit rating
* Made historic investments in K-12 education and cleared the way for schools to boost teacher pay
* Expanded school safety efforts and implemented recommendations to improve child services
* Strengthened Indiana’s already transformational road and rail programs
* Doubled down on Next Level Jobs programs
* Connected more Hoosiers to affordable broadband service
* Passed a bias crimes law and modernized our tax code
* Helped more babies reach their first birthday

“I am proud of what was accomplished this legislative session and the way it was accomplished — by working together collaboratively,” said **Governor Holcomb**.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=41cfd0eda3&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Indiana GOP: Mayor Buttigieg, Release the Hidden Police Tapes_** While South Bend Mayor Pete Buttigieg is running in the lefter-than-left Democrat primary for president, at the Indiana Republican Party we're keeping him accountable.

In the latest from the campaign trail, Chairman Hupfer this week called on South Bend Mayor Pete Buttigieg to immediately release five hidden tapes at the center of a seven-year long court battle over the firing of the city’s first-ever African-American police chief, following a [new court ruling](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=52c2eb2b4b&e=1acd9bb3d6) that the case can now proceed to trial.

**“Mayor Buttigieg has wasted millions of taxpayer dollars in a seven-year effort to keep these tapes secret and hidden from the public,”** said Chairman Hupfer. **“This court battle has gone on long enough and cost far too much. Mayor Buttigieg should release the tapes immediately before it costs the city even a penny more.”**

Read more abut the court case and Buttigieg's role at the center of the controversy [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=27b39e5f66&e=1acd9bb3d6).

| **_Lincoln Day Dinners:_**
_**Big Crowds & More Great Speakers!**_ The strength of our Republican Party comes from YOU, our grassroots Republicans who help power phenomenal Lincoln Day Dinners in counties across Indiana! Indiana's local Republican Parties at the county level organized nine Lincoln Day Dinners in the last week in Dearborn, Jasper, Adams, St. Joseph, Jay, LaPorte, Harrison, DeKalb and Porter Counties. Wow!

And every county Lincoln Day Dinner always has a great keynote speaker, whether that's a local congressman -- like **Congressman Greg Pence, Congressman Jim Banks** or **Congressman Trey Hollingsworth** , senator -- like**Senator Mike Braun** , or a nationally-recognized speaker like **Candace Owens** from Turning Point USA.

subject: US Economy Grows by 3.2% in the First Quarter, Topping Expectations
body:
“The U.S. economy grew at a faster pace than expected in the first quarter and posted its best growth to start a year in four years.” | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d796d0d7ae&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **US Economy Grows by 3.2% in the First Quarter, Topping Expectations**

“The U.S. economy grew at a faster pace than expected in the first quarter and posted its best growth to start a year in four years,” Fred Imbert reports for CNBC.

“First-quarter gross domestic product expanded by 3.2%, the Bureau of Economic Analysis said Friday in its initial read of the economy for that period. Economists polled by Dow Jones expected growth of 2.5%.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=41a5b3c80a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Donald Trump is taking a principled stand against congressional overreach, refusing to allow Democrats to use Congress as a taxpayer-funded opposition research firm for 2020,” Jenna Ellis writes in _[USA Today](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cfa6e0be88&e=3ee4985eea)_. “Special counsel Robert Mueller has completed his two-year investigation, finding that there was no Russia ‘collusion’ and bringing no obstruction of justice charge. But now, House Democrats have shifted their own version of the discredited partisan witch hunt into full gear.”
---
|
---
| “One of the biggest failures of the Mueller probe concerns not what was in the final report, but what was not. Close readers will search in vain for any analysis of the central document in this affair: the infamous ‘dossier.’ It’s a stunning omission,” Kimberly Strassel writes in _[The Wall Street Journal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c95cb9257f&e=3ee4985eea)_. “Thanks to the special counsel we know Republicans weren’t playing footsie with Russians. But thanks to BuzzFeed, we know that Democrats were. America deserves to know how far that interaction extended.”
---
|
---
| “Veterans of the 1993 Battle of Mogadishu have slammed [Rep. Ilhan Omar (D-MN)], for accusing them of killing ‘thousands’ of Somalis and ignoring the fact they were engaged in a United Nations mission designed to protect civilians from a murderous warlord following a devastating famine and civil war,” Russ Read reports for the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=519ab7b79f&e=3ee4985eea)_. “Danny McKnight, who was the Ranger colonel who commanded U.S. troops, and Kyle Lamb, who was a Delta Force operator, said they were in Somalia in part to protect the Majerteen, Omar's tribe, from the ruthless warlord Mohammed Farah Aidid.” 19 U.S. troops were killed in service of that mission.

name: Governor William Winter
subject: Jim Hood can win this race
body:

Friend,

I know firsthand that improving our public schools is the key to building a more inclusive state where everyone has the opportunity to succeed. Every Mississippi child deserves a first-class education no matter where they live, and for too many years we have underfunded our public schools, underpaid our teachers, and shortchanged our children.

These are the issues that are on my mind as we approach a crucial gubernatorial election in Mississippi this November, and I'm reaching out because one candidate rises above the rest as the candidate who will improve education in our state.

**That person is Jim Hood.**

As Governor, Jim will lead the effort for greater state support of our public schools and the establishment of statewide pre-K so every child gets an equal start. And I know that he will work with both parties and all segments of society to build a better state that works for everyone.

I am supporting Jim Hood for Governor and I hope you will too.

But to win, Jim needs your financial support. The competition in this race is very well-funded, but with the grassroots support of Mississippians, Jim Hood can not only win this race, but can build a stronger and more prosperous Mississippi for everyone.

subject: The best way to drown out Trump’s onslaught of Facebook ads
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

Donald Trump is rapidly ramping up Facebook ads to build his 2020
campaign. We need to keep our momentum up in order to
compete.

The best way to drown out Trump’s dangerous rhetoric is by having more
conversations with voters about Beto’s positive vision.

Amazing volunteers have already knocked on thousands of doors across the
country. Beto is traveling to more towns and cities than any other
candidate. But we need larger numbers of volunteers to get involved so we
can reach more voters.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/signup-canvass-host/?source=ema20190426&t=1001&akid=28774%2E444211%2Et1dzOz ]It looks like there’s no canvass event happening near you! Can you sign
up to lead one so we can reach people in Englewood with our positive
vision?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/signup-canvass-host/?source=ema20190426&t=1002&akid=28774%2E444211%2Et1dzOz ]Lead a canvass »

If this seems a little intimidating at first, there’s no need to worry.
We’ve got great tools and training to help. These conversations are mainly
about listening and gathering the info we’ll need to build a large base of
voters so we can share key updates with them when it’s most important.

Unlike many campaigns, ours is driven by the belief that face-to-face
conversations is the best way to connect with people. No misleading
advertisements funded by shady big money players.

Every person that signs up to volunteer and every voter that we talk to
matters. Together, we can build a winning grassroots campaign by reaching
more voters than any presidential effort has ever done before. That’s how
we’re going to build a country that truly works for all.

This campaign can overcome Trump’s efforts to keep the White House if
enough people get involved to help us reach every voter. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/signup-canvass-host/?source=ema20190426&t=1003&akid=28774%2E444211%2Et1dzOz ]Please sign up
to lead a canvass in your community now.

Thanks for all you do,

Beto Organizing Team

P.S. If you are physically prevented from knocking on doors, there are
more ways to volunteer. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/volunteer/?source=ema20190426&t=1004&akid=28774%2E444211%2Et1dzOz ]Just sign up here and indicate how you’d like
to help.

name: Ed Markey
subject: Your ☎️is ringing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
|
---
[]()

| | | Team,

Are you getting tons of robocalls? Even dozens a day? Are some coming from overseas or from numbers that look an awful lot like your phone number?

It seems no one is immune from the scourge of pre-recorded robocalls trying to scam you out of your money. And the calls seem to never stop coming.

Robocalls have become an epidemic that must be stopped.

That's why I introduced the TRACED Act, a bill that l will give authorities the ability to find, catch, and prosecute scammers.

_**[If you're as sick of the robocalls as I am, then I need you to add your name as a Citizen Co-Sponsor of the TRACED Act and help stop robocall scammers.](http://ma.edmarkey. "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/citizen-co-sponsor-traced-act-pros?source=042619&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://ma.edmarkey. "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/citizen-co-sponsor-traced-act-pros?source=042619&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
The TRACED Act gives the FCC the authority to levy civil penalties against scammers, extends the window from one to three years to take action against intentional violators, and requires telephone providers to adopt call authentication technologies to verify that incoming calls are legitimate.

This bill already has overwhelming bipartisan support. But we need to show that the American people are behind ending the scourge of robocalls.

_**[Will you add your name and become a Citizen Co-Sponsor of the TRACED Act and help stop robocall scammers?](http://ma.edmarkey. "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/citizen-co-sponsor-traced-act-pros?source=042619&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

Thanks,

Ed

In a few days, we'll close the books on April -- if you've been following the news, you know why we need to turn our fundraising up a notch.
_FiveThirtyEight_ reports that we're now tied for the lead in a study of activist Democrats in early states. And among those who haven't made up their minds yet, we're neck and neck at the front of the pack.
But yesterday, Joe Biden became the 20th Democrat to throw his hat in the ring just as our early state strategy is showing real signs of paying off. **If we don 't capitalize on this momentum right now, there's no guarantee we'll get a second chance.**

Cory

body:
The stakes are high right now. Meeting our goal before this deadline will make sure we're able to grow this movement, and increase the number of states we're organizing in at the pace we need to win. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fe91/45c30650/88132489/66979a43/2112111163/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
We only have four days left to hit our April fundraising goal -- and as of this afternoon, we're tracking a little behind.

The stakes are high right now. Meeting our goal before this deadline will make sure we're able to grow this movement, and increase the number of states we're organizing in at the pace we need to win.

But even though the pressure is high, **you won 't see Elizabeth resort to hopping around big cities to host swanky fundraisers with wealthy donors.

You won't see Elizabeth take a dime from federally registered lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind. You won't see Elizabeth cozy up to billionaires and nudge them to dump buckets of cash into a Super PAC for her.**

**[Instead, grassroots donors are the only people who fund our campaign. Can you make a $3 contribution today? Every new contribution that comes in will help our campaign get back on track to hitting this important April fundraising goal.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fe91/45c30650/88132489/66979a42/2112111163/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWFwcjE5ZW9tIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDQyNmVtMi1uby1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-apr19eom?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190426em2-no-full")**

Hitting this fundraising goal is just the first step of Elizabeth's plan to put power in the hands of the people, where it belongs -- not in the clutches of the rich and powerful.

Elizabeth has a plan to make big, structural change -- the type of change that rips out the root causes of the deep problems in our economy, our government, and our democracy.

Because let's face it: There are systemic problems that led to someone like Donald Trump getting elected in the first place. He's only the symptom, not the cause, of the crises we face.

To make real change, we need to build a massive grassroots movement, and we need bold ideas.

That's what Elizabeth is focused on.

Instead of catering to wealthy and well-connected donors, she'll spend the next few days at meet and greets and organizing events with people in Iowa and Nevada. And she'll keep proposing substantive ideas that would level the playing field for working people.

**Elizabeth 's time is not for sale, and she's running to be the best president that money can't buy. This movement is only possible because of support from people like you.

[So we have to ask: Can you chip in for the first time? Meeting our goal before this deadline will make sure we're able to grow this movement, and increase the number of states we're organizing in at the pace we need to win. | | | "" We only have four days left to hit our April fundraising goal -- and as of this afternoon, we're tracking a little behind. The stakes are high right now. Meeting our goal before this deadline will make sure we're able to grow this movement, and increase the number of states we're organizing in at the pace we need to win. But even though the pressure is high, you won 't see Elizabeth resort to hopping around big cities to host swanky fundraisers with wealthy donors. You won't see Elizabeth take a dime from federally registered lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind. You won't see Elizabeth cozy up to billionaires and nudge them to dump buckets of cash into a Super PAC for her. "" Hitting this fundraising goal is just the first step of Elizabeth's plan to put power in the hands of the people, where it belongs -- not in the clutches of the rich and powerful. Elizabeth has a plan to make big, structural change -- the type of change that rips out the root causes of the deep problems in our economy, our government, and our democracy. Because let's face it: There are systemic problems that led to someone like Donald Trump getting elected in the first place. He's only the symptom, not the cause, of the crises we face. To make real change, we need to build a massive grassroots movement, and we need bold ideas. That's what Elizabeth is focused on. Instead of catering to wealthy and well-connected donors, she'll spend the next few days at meet and greets and organizing events with people in Iowa and Nevada. And she'll keep proposing substantive ideas that would level the playing field for working people. Elizabeth 's time is not for sale, and she's running to be the best president that money can't buy. This movement is only possible because of support from people like you. "" Thanks, Team Warren | "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2019 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02116

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Keith and Awad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
This is who we're fighting for as a campaign. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377169f/691c9bd/6c489692/11a4a27f/2575589212/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-em-apr?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team,

My friend Keith sent me this picture this week from his farm in the Colorado plains. He and his family are out in the fields preparing for corn-planting time by checking the moisture and depth of the soil.
[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377169f/691c9bd/6c489692/11a4a27c/2575589212/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-em-apr?refcode=em_fr_20190426_JH_20190426-fr-JH-keithawad-all_all_i1&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

I love this up-close glimpse of Keith's life on the farm--a line of work different from mine, occurring in a different environment, requiring different expertise and skills. It reminds me of the huge array of talents it takes to make a society function, and the sheer range of experiences that our neighbors are having every single day.

I've known Keith for a long time, but one of the great things about a campaign is the opportunity to make all kinds of new friends. Every day on the trail, I hear new stories that enlarge and reshape my perspective on who I'm fighting for in this race. Every day, I hear people sharing their hopes and dreams about the stories they want to write for themselves in America.

(This campaign is also an unfolding story--and continuing to tell it will take resources, which makes it essential that we stay on track with our April fundraising goal. [**_Can you help us maintain our progress toward that goal with a donation now?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377169f/691c9bd/6c489692/11a4a27d/2575589212/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-em-apr?refcode=em_fr_20190426_JH_20190426-fr-JH-keithawad-all_all_l1&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer="))

This month, I also met Awad in Muscatine, Iowa. His story is as American as they come--an immigrant chef from Palestine who specializes in French and Italian cuisine, he just became a citizen after almost 20 years in this country. Meeting Awad, and reflecting on the path that brought him (and his delicious pasta bolognese) to Iowa, reminded me that we are a crossroads for the entire world, and our policies and our leaders should affirm that.
[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377169f/691c9bd/6c489692/11a4a27a/2575589212/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-em-apr?refcode=em_fr_20190426_JH_20190426-fr-JH-keithawad-all_all_i2&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Each and every day, we're building the story of this campaign and who we're fighting for--but we need your help to continue doing it. **_[Before the end of April, we need to meet our fundraising goal in order to grow more competitive in the coming months. Can you help by chipping in now?](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377169f/691c9bd/6c489692/11a4a27b/2575589212/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-em-apr?refcode=em_fr_20190426_JH_20190426-fr-JH-keithawad-all_all_l2&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")_** Thank you,

John [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377169f/691c9bd/6c489692/11a4a278/2575589212/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-em-apr?refcode=em_fr_20190426_JH_20190426-fr-JH-keithawad-all_all_contribbutton&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

** **
---

---

More voices make us a stronger party, but even I admit it's getting hard to keep track of how many Democrats are running for president. As of today, we're at 20 candidates. **The truth is this poses a real challenge for an underdog campaign like ours.** Space on the debate stage is limited, and we know the DNC will decide who makes it based in part on how many donors each campaign has. [_**Will you help guarantee my spot by making a donation today?**_](https://act.corybooker. We chose a difficult path -- from Day One, we've refused to take money from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists. I'm proud of the way we're building this campaign together. **That means I need you.** With so many great Democrats running, I'm not asking you to support me and only me. There's a lot of time left to decide who should be our party's nominee. [_**But if you believe I 'm worth taking a chance on -- if you want my voice in the national debate -- your donation today would mean so much.**_](https://act.corybooker. Have you seen the news?

In the first 24 hours of his presidential campaign (welcome to the race!), Joe Biden raised $6.3 million.

How does that compare to our campaign? Well just take it from this _Politico_ reporter... [Please chip in $3 or whatever you can right now to help close the gap.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fea1/45c30650/8975365f/66978378/1488668316/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWFwcjE5ZW9tIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDQyNmVtMy1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-apr19eom?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190426em3-full")**

But as more candidates jump into the race and scoop up huge checks, your support is even more critical. We can't risk being left in the dust.

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Keith & Awad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
This is who we're fighting for as a campaign. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377169e/691c9bd/6c4de747/11a4a3bc/92897317/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-em-apr?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team,

My friend Keith sent me this picture this week from his farm in the Colorado plains. He and his family are out in the fields preparing for corn-planting time by checking the moisture and depth of the soil.
[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377169e/691c9bd/6c4de747/11a4a3bd/92897317/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-em-apr?refcode=em_fr_20190426_JH_20190426-fr-JH-keithawadbump-nop_nop_i1&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

I love this up-close glimpse of Keith's life on the farm--a line of work different from mine, occurring in a different environment, requiring different expertise and skills. It reminds me of the huge array of talents it takes to make a society function, and the sheer range of experiences that our neighbors are having every single day.

I've known Keith for a long time, but one of the great things about a campaign is the opportunity to make all kinds of new friends. Every day on the trail, I hear new stories that enlarge and reshape my perspective on who I'm fighting for in this race. Every day, I hear people sharing their hopes and dreams about the stories they want to write for themselves in America.

(This campaign is also an unfolding story--and continuing to tell it will take resources, which makes it essential that we stay on track with our April fundraising goal. [**_Can you help us maintain our progress toward that goal with a donation now?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377169e/691c9bd/6c4de747/11a4a3ba/92897317/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-em-apr?refcode=em_fr_20190426_JH_20190426-fr-JH-keithawadbump-nop_nop_l1&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer="))

This month, I also met Awad in Muscatine, Iowa. His story is as American as they come--an immigrant chef who specializes in French and Italian cuisine, he just became a citizen after almost 20 years in this country. Meeting Awad, and reflecting on the path that brought him (and his delicious pasta bolognese) to Iowa, reminded me that we are a crossroads for the entire world, and our policies and our leaders should affirm that.
[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377169e/691c9bd/6c4de747/11a4a3bb/92897317/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-em-apr?refcode=em_fr_20190426_JH_20190426-fr-JH-keithawadbump-nop_nop_i2&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Each and every day, we're building the story of this campaign and who we're fighting for--but we need your help to continue doing it. **_[Before the end of April, we need to meet our fundraising goal in order to grow more competitive in the coming months. Can you help by chipping in now?](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377169e/691c9bd/6c4de747/11a4a3b8/92897317/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-em-apr?refcode=em_fr_20190426_JH_20190426-fr-JH-keithawadbump-nop_nop_l2&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")_** Thank you,

John [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377169e/691c9bd/6c4de747/11a4a3b9/92897317/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-em-apr?refcode=em_fr_20190426_JH_20190426-fr-JH-keithawadbump-nop_nop_contribbutton&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

clean_body: This is who we're fighting for as a campaign. | | | "" | Team, My friend Keith sent me this picture this week from his farm in the Colorado plains. He and his family are out in the fields preparing for corn-planting time by checking the moisture and depth of the soil. "=" I love this up-close glimpse of Keith's life on the farm--a line of work different from mine, occurring in a different environment, requiring different expertise and skills. It reminds me of the huge array of talents it takes to make a society function, and the sheer range of experiences that our neighbors are having every single day. I've known Keith for a long time, but one of the great things about a campaign is the opportunity to make all kinds of new friends. Every day on the trail, I hear new stories that enlarge and reshape my perspective on who I'm fighting for in this race. Every day, I hear people sharing their hopes and dreams about the stories they want to write for themselves in America. (This campaign is also an unfolding story--and continuing to tell it will take resources, which makes it essential that we stay on track with our April fundraising goal. "=") This month, I also met Awad in Muscatine, Iowa. His story is as American as they come--an immigrant chef who specializes in French and Italian cuisine, he just became a citizen after almost 20 years in this country. Meeting Awad, and reflecting on the path that brought him (and his delicious pasta bolognese) to Iowa, reminded me that we are a crossroads for the entire world, and our policies and our leaders should affirm that. "=" Each and every day, we're building the story of this campaign and who we're fighting for--but we need your help to continue doing it.
